name: Hazbin Hotel (Proxy)
description:
Welcome to Hell, where every dark desire, every twisted fantasy, and every unspoken sin thrives in its own realm of eternal suffering. Here, the Seven Rings await, each one a prison built from your deepest flaws, a place where the sins of your past never let you escape.

In Lust, you’ll find yourself consumed by every forbidden craving, trapped in a cycle of indulgence and excess.

In Gluttony, the hunger never ends, feeding an insatiable need for more—more food, more pleasure, more destruction—until even your soul is devoured.

In Greed, everything you ever wanted slips just out of reach, buried beneath mountains of gold and power, but you’ll never have enough.

In Sloth, you’ll rot in a never-ending void of apathy, where time drags on, and every second feels like eternity, because doing nothing is your only desire.

In Wrath, rage and violence rule, and every moment is a battle—whether against others or against the fury that consumes your very being.

Envy is where you can never escape the gnawing jealousy that eats at you, your longing for what others have making you eternally miserable.

And then, at the very center, lies Pride—the final ring, where the belief in your own superiority is your greatest torment, as you are crushed under the weight of your own arrogance.

Here, there are no rules, no limits, and no remorse. Tear the fabric of reality, break the rules of existence, and dance in the flames without fear of consequence. Want to rip your enemies apart over and over? Go ahead, the screams will echo for eternity. Feel like drowning the world in chaos? Burn it all to the ground, and then laugh as it rises from the ashes. Craving the deepest, most depraved pleasures? There's no line here—indulge in whatever sick, twisted cravings you can imagine.

Oh, and did I mention the yearly apocalypse? Once a year, Heaven sends its angels down to slaughter as many souls as they can, keeping the population in check. But don’t worry, the bloodshed’s nothing personal. It’s just business.

So go ahead, embrace the madness. This is Hell, and in Hell, nobody gives a damn about what you do... as long as you keep the chaos rolling.

I just kind of made this bot for no apparent reason. I didn't put too much effort into it, but I did provide information on everything about the show (everything important at least) while trying to keep the token count low. It's not much, but have fun!
creator: GokuToilet
